configuration.runtime_stubs_file.description: The file into which runtime stubs should be written.
configuration.target_regex.description: Regular expression to be matched against the module target. Only targets that match this regex will be instrumented.
configuration.function_regex.description: Regular expression to be matched against a function name. Only functions that match this regex will be instrumented.
configuration.demangle_function_names.description: Demangle functions names passed to the runtime.

module.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
module.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

module.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
module.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

global.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
global.address.description: The address of the global (replaceable for definitions).
global.address_space.description: The address space of the global.
global.declared_size.description: The size of the declared type of the global.
global.initial_value.description: The initial value of the global.
global.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

global.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
global.address.description: The address of the global (replaceable for definitions).
global.address_space.description: The address space of the global.
global.declared_size.description: The size of the declared type of the global.
global.initial_value.description: The initial value of the global.
global.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

function.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
function.is_main.description: Flag to indicate it is the main function.
function.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

function.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
function.is_main.description: Flag to indicate it is the main function.
function.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

alloca.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
alloca.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

unreachable.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
unreachable.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

load.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
load.pointer_as.description: The address space of the accessed pointer.
load.base_pointer_info.description: The runtime provided base pointer info.
load.value_size.description: The size of the loaded value.
load.value_type_id.description: The type id of the loaded value.
load.value_sub_type_id.description: The sub type id of the loaded value (for arrays and vectors, or -1).
load.atomicity_ordering.description: The atomicity ordering of the load.
load.sync_scope_id.description: The sync scope id of the load.
load.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

store.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
store.pointer_as.description: The address space of the accessed pointer.
store.base_pointer_info.description: The runtime provided base pointer info.
store.value_size.description: The size of the stored value.
store.value_type_id.description: The type id of the stored value.
store.value_sub_type_id.description: The type id of the stored value (for arrays and vectors, or -1).
store.atomicity_ordering.description: The atomicity ordering of the store.
store.sync_scope_id.description: The sync scope id of the store.
store.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

cast.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
cast.input_type_id.description: The type id of the input value.
cast.input_sub_type_id.description: The sub type id of the input value (for arrays and vectors, or -1).
cast.input_size.description: The size of the input value.
cast.result_type_id.description: The type id of the result value.
cast.result_sub_type_id.description: The sub type id of the result value (for arrays and vectors, or -1).
cast.result_size.description: The size of the result value.
cast.opcode.description: The opcode of the cast instruction.
cast.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

numeric.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
numeric.sub_type_id.description: The operation's sub type id (for arrays and vectors, or -1).
numeric.right.description: The operation's right operand. This value is poison for unary operations.
numeric.flags.description: A bitmask value signaling which instruction flags are present.
numeric.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

compare.flags.description: A bitmask value signaling which instruction flags are present.
compare.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call
